headline: Morgan Stanley Raises Price Target on Western Digital (WDC). Here is Why
summary: With a net profit margin of 55.03%, Western Digital Corporation (NASDAQ:WDC) is included among the 12 Most Profitable American Stocks to Buy in 2026. headline: SpaceX, Apple, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market

headline: Intel jumps after Trump says Apple, Intel reached US chip deal

headline: SanDisk Jumps 11%, Western Digital Rises 7% After Apple Flags “Unavoidable” Memory Price Hikes
summary: SanDisk (NASDAQ:SNDK) stock is surging in Thursday trading, up 11% to $2,170. Western Digital (NASDAQ:WDC) stock is also flying, up 7% to roughly $764. headline: Stocks Rally Before the Open on U.S.-Iran Peace Deal
summary: June S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESM26) are up +0.98%, and June Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQM26) are up +1.64% this morning, pointing to a sharply higher open on Wall Street as sentiment got a boost after U.S. President Donald Trump signed a preliminary agreement to end the Iran war.

headline: Western Digital (WDC) Is Up 45.3% After AI Storage Momentum and Rising Memory Prices - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In recent days, Western Digital has been at the center of a wave of positive research updates, product showcases for AI data centers, and stronger earnings, all tied to surging demand for high-capacity storage and memory. This momentum has been reinforced by easing geopolitical risks, industry-wide optimism on AI infrastructure, and confirmation from major customers like Apple that memory price increases are becoming unavoidable. Together, these developments highlight how Western Digital has...

headline: Is The AI Super-Cycle Real Enough To Bet On Micron Stock?
